---
title: "Reference"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This page renders the current CLI help by running the `ir` executable on `PATH` during the Quarto render.

## `ir`

```{r}
#| comment: ""
cat(system2("ir", c("--help"), stdout = TRUE), sep = "\n")
```

## `ir run`

```{r}
#| comment: ""
cat(system2("ir", c("run", "--help"), stdout = TRUE), sep = "\n")
```

## `ir tool`

```{r}
#| comment: ""
cat(system2("ir", c("tool", "--help"), stdout = TRUE), sep = "\n")
```

## `ir tool run`

```{r}
#| comment: ""
cat(system2("ir", c("tool", "run", "--help"), stdout = TRUE), sep = "\n")
```

## `ir tool install`

```{r}
#| comment: ""
cat(system2("ir", c("tool", "install", "--help"), stdout = TRUE), sep = "\n")
```

## `ir cache`

```{r}
#| comment: ""
cat(system2("ir", c("cache", "--help"), stdout = TRUE), sep = "\n")
```

## `ir cache dir`

```{r}
#| comment: ""
cat(system2("ir", c("cache", "dir", "--help"), stdout = TRUE), sep = "\n")
```

## `ir cache clean`

```{r}
#| comment: ""
cat(system2("ir", c("cache", "clean", "--help"), stdout = TRUE), sep = "\n")
```
